meaning: 科摩[意大利北部城市](在科摩湖畔,有丝绸城之称)
examples: As the golden summer changed into the deep golden autumn he went to the Lake of Como.
Even now, silk processed in the province of Como in northern Italy enjoys an esteemed reputation.
I am staying with friends in a villa outside of Milan, in the fashionable Lake Como area.
Sadly, David has to leave us to attend to his lovely new Bangkok restaurant, nahm (metropolitan.bangkok.como.bz).
"Perry Como wasn't that different to me than Paul Simon or Ray Charles, " she tells NPR's Linda Wertheimer.
